author: pawandhananjay
content: I think we can have something by then

author: terencechain
content: One point is that handling external builders does not have to be consensus breaking. If a client is not ready, it can simply avoid subscribing to the proposer preference and builder bid subnets, so it does not get downscored. Prysm already has support for this, it has not been tested yet. At a minimum, Prysm nodes can gossip with other Prysm nodes on those subnets, and any client that is ready can join them after a restart
